name: Turkey with Southwest Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven according to the package instructions.
2. Remove any giblets from the turkey cavity and rinse inside and out with cold water.
3. Pat the turkey dry with paper towels.
4. In a large bowl, combine the melted butter or margarine with the southwest stuffing mixture.
5. Stuff the turkey cavity generously with the seasoned stuffing.
6. Season the outside of the turkey with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Place the turkey breast-side up in a roasting pan.
8. Cover the pan tightly with aluminum foil.
9. Roast the turkey in the preheated oven for the appropriate time based on weight (generally 15-20 minutes per pound).
10. Remove the foil during the last portion of cooking to brown the skin.
11. Let the turkey rest for at least 20 minutes before carving.
12. Turn off the heat and let the stuffing inside cool completely before serving.
